title: Device Settings - Do Not Disturb
scenario: Do Not Disturb toggle in Device Settings enables red blinking LEDs on headset when Wear Sensor is off
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Navigate to the Home screen and tap on the connected [Device Name].
4. Locate the Do Not Disturb (DND) tab/section.
5. Tap on the DND tab to expand it.
6. Verify that a toggle switch and the description text are displayed: "Enable the indicator on your headset to inform others that you are not to be interrupted."
7. Ensure Wear Sensor is turned OFF (in Device Settings or Audio Settings).
8. Tap the DND toggle to switch it ON.
10. Tap the DND toggle to switch it OFF.
expected: The DND tab is present and expandable, showing a toggle and the description text. When toggled ON (with Wear Sensor OFF), the headset LEDs blink red. When toggled OFF, the LEDs turn off.
